hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold text-[#0A2D6B] tracking-tight

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
cards.icon_wrapper: w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-[#F5F7FA] flex items-center justify-center mb-6 text-[#18B7B0]

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: w-full rounded-lg border border-gray-200 px-4 py-3 bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#18B7B0] focus:border-transparent transition-all

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling to provide a premium Fortune 500 feel.

icons.usage: Use crisp, minimalist icons with a stroke width of 1.5. Apply the Teal (#18B7B0) color for accents.

specific_page_patterns.hero: Split layout or overlay approach. Use a clean Light Grey (#F5F7FA) background on one side, and the hero_background image on the other, subtly tinted with Navy (#0A2D6B/10). Ensure 'Precision. Purity. Progress.' stands out in Poppins. Include an animated scroll indicator (mouse icon with bouncing dot) at the bottom.
specific_page_patterns.why_choose_us: Grid of 6 clean, minimalist cards representing USPs. Use the 'cards.base' styling. Icons should be inside 'cards.icon_wrapper'.
specific_page_patterns.product_categories: A dense but clean 15-item grid (using Tailwind grid). Each item can be a sleek card with an icon, category name (Poppins, semi-bold), and a subtle right-arrow that animates on hover.
specific_page_patterns.therapeutic_segments: Similar to product categories, perhaps a masonry or bento grid to break monotony, using high-quality images where applicable with a #0A2D6B gradient overlay.
specific_page_patterns.quality_timeline: A vertical timeline down the center. Use Framer Motion to draw the line as the user scrolls. Nodes glow Teal (#18B7B0) when active. Alternate content left and right.
specific_page_patterns.export_markets_map: Render a clean, stylized SVG world map. Highlight regions like Middle East, Africa, Asia, etc. in Teal (#18B7B0). Include tooltip interactions.
specific_page_patterns.stats_counters: Large statistical numbers text-5xl to text-6xl in #0A2D6B. Animate using a count-up effect on scroll.
specific_page_patterns.forms: Minimalist contact/quotation forms. Inputs use #F5F7FA background, subtle borders, and a floating label or clear placeholders. Submit button in #0A2D6B.

technical_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='nav-link-products').
technical_instructions.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG 2.2 AA standards. Forms must have accessible labels. Images must have alt attributes.
technical_instructions.ui_components: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for custom layouts (marketing pages), and Shadcn UI (customized to match the KREVION brand) for forms, dropdowns, and complex interactive elements.
